storage.value:
Overview

Technical specification for the User Onboarding Redesign (Jira DEV-42). Product requirements in Notion PRD. UI designs in Figma.

Architecture

Auth Changes

The new flow requires OAuth 2.0 PKCE for mobile clients (Linear ENG-101, Alice implementing). This replaces the legacy implicit grant flow and unblocks mobile deep links — currently broken on Android 14+ (Jira DEV-34, GitHub #234).

Real-time Progress

WebSocket-based progress sync across tabs/devices (Linear ENG-104, completed Sprint 11). Uses the same WS infrastructure as the notification system.

Data Model

New tables: onboarding_progress, onboarding_step_completion. Migration in PR #189.

Dependencies

  • PKCE auth migration (ENG-101) — in progress
  • Android deep link fix (DEV-34, PR #190) — blocked by flaky CI (ENG-103)
  • API v2 versioning (DEV-50, PR #191) — onboarding API will use v2 endpoints

Rollout Plan

Phase 1: New users only (behind feature flag). Phase 2: Existing users see upgrade prompt. See Notion 'API v2 Launch Plan' for coordinated rollout with API v2.
